ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2024 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:20 am and concluding at 9:55 am.

Plaintiff Schlegel & Schlegel Professional Consulting Inc. is represented by David A Makman, Esq.
Defendant Mosser Companies, Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff's counsel presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

MATT SCHLEGEL is examined by the Court.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Email.........................................ID/EVID

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Schlegel & Schlegel Professional Consulting Inc., and against Defendant Mosser Companies, Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $63,820.89
2. Prejudgment Interest: $0
3. Costs: $1068.05

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $64,888.94

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
